title: AVE: Local-first AI video editor for Mac | Product Hunt
excerpt: AVE is a local-first AI video editor for Mac. It helps creators import footage, analyze transcripts and visual notes, search by what appears or is said in clips, then turn selected footage into reviewable timeline work. AVE is useful for launch videos, B-roll search, interview highlights, generated-footage assembly, and private local editing where the project should stay on the Mac by default.
content_html: AVE is a local-first AI video editor for Mac. It helps creators import footage, analyze transcripts and visual notes, search by what appears or is said in clips, then turn selected footage into reviewable timeline work. AVE is useful for launch videos, B-roll search, interview highlights, generated-footage assembly, and private local editing where the project should stay on the Mac by default.
content_text: AVE is a local-first AI video editor for Mac. It helps creators import footage, analyze transcripts and visual notes, search by what appears or is said in clips, then turn selected footage into reviewable timeline work. AVE is useful for launch videos, B-roll search, interview highlights, generated-footage assembly, and private local editing where the project should stay on the Mac by default.

blocks.html_en: AVE is a local-first AI video editor for Mac. It helps creators import footage, analyze transcripts and visual notes, search by what appears or is said in clips, then turn selected footage into reviewable timeline work. AVE is useful for launch videos, B-roll search, interview highlights, generated-footage assembly, and private local editing where the project should stay on the Mac by default.

sentences.en: AVE is a local-first AI video editor for Mac.
sentences.zh: AVE 是 Mac 上本地优先的 AI 视频编辑器。

sentences.en: It helps creators import footage, analyze transcripts and visual notes, search by what appears or is said in clips, then turn selected footage into reviewable timeline work.
sentences.zh: 它可以帮助创作者导入素材、分析文字记录和视觉注释、根据剪辑中出现或所说的内容进行搜索，然后将选定的素材转换为可审阅的时间线作品。

sentences.en: AVE is useful for launch videos, B-roll search, interview highlights, generated-footage assembly, and private local editing where the project should stay on the Mac by default.
sentences.zh: AVE 对于发布视频、幕后花絮搜索、采访精彩片段、生成的素材组合和私人本地编辑非常有用，其中项目默认情况下应保留在 Mac 上。

content_html_zh: AVE 是 Mac 上本地优先的 AI 视频编辑器。 它可以帮助创作者导入素材、分析文字记录和视觉注释、根据剪辑中出现或所说的内容进行搜索，然后将选定的素材转换为可审阅的时间线作品。 AVE 对于发布视频、幕后花絮搜索、采访精彩片段、生成的素材组合和私人本地编辑非常有用，其中项目默认情况下应保留在 Mac 上。
